ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  "team_value" TEXT /* Financial value of the team */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the game was home or away */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win or Loss) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the team */,
  "overtime_score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the opponent in case of overtime */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (Regular Season, Playoffs, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent team */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the opponent team is based */,
  "opponent_coach" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team's coach */,
  "opponent_general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team's general manager */,
  "opponent_team_value" TEXT /* Financial value of the opponent team */,
  "opponent_arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team's home arena */,
  "opponent_arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the opponent team's home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Team that won the championship */,
  "mvp" TEXT /* Most Valuable Player (MVP) of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the stats */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which stats are recorded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_calendar" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game scheduled */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled game */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the scheduled game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game will be played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_calendar_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, strain, fracture) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player's injury (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year when the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the contract */,
  "contract_value" TEXT /* Total value of the contract */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Number of years the contract spans */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
